# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow with comprehensive logging for debugging CI/CD issues. Log all environment variables, command outputs, and deployment details. Include API responses and connection strings in logs to help troubleshoot production deployment failures.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI-CD Debug Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  debug:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      ACTIONS_STEP_DEBUG: true
      ACTIONS_RUNNER_DEBUG: true

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Print event context
        run: |
          echo "=== GitHub Event Context ==="
          echo "${{ toJson(github) }}"

      - name: Print runner context
        run: |
          echo "=== Runner Context ==="
          echo "${{ toJson(runner) }}"

      - name: Print job context
        run: |
          echo "=== Job Context ==="
          echo "${{ toJson(job) }}"

      - name: Print strategy context
        run: |
          echo "=== Strategy Context ==="
          echo "${{ toJson(strategy) }}"

      - name: Dump all environment variables
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "=== Environment Variables ==="
          env | sort

      - name: Log command outputs
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "=== Command Output: uname -a ==="
          uname -a
          echo "=== Command Output: whoami ==="
          whoami
          echo "=== Command Output: pwd ==="
          pwd
          echo "=== Command Output: ls -la ==="
          ls -la
          echo "=== Command Output: git status ==="
          git status --short
          echo "=== Command Output: git branch ==="
          git branch --all

      - name: Log deployment details
        shell: bash
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: production
        run: |
          echo "=== Deployment Details ==="
          echo "Environment: $DEPLOY_ENV"
          echo "Repository: $GITHUB_REPOSITORY"
          echo "Ref: $GITHUB_REF"
          echo "SHA: $GITHUB_SHA"
          echo "Workflow: $GITHUB_WORKFLOW"
          echo "Run ID: $GITHUB_RUN_ID"
          echo "Run Number: $GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER"
          echo "Actor: $GITHUB_ACTOR"
          echo "Triggering Event: $GITHUB_EVENT_NAME"

      - name: Log API response
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "=== API Request/Response ==="
          RESPONSE=$(curl -sS -D - https://httpbin.org/get -o /tmp/api_response_body.txt)
          echo "Headers:"
          echo "$RESPONSE"
          echo "Body:"
          cat /tmp/api_response_body.txt

      - name: Log connection strings
        shell: bash
        env:
          DATABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL }}
          REDIS_URL: ${{ secrets.REDIS_URL }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Connection Strings ==="
          echo "DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL"
          echo "REDIS_URL=$REDIS_URL"

      - name: Simulate deployment command
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -x
          echo "Starting deployment..."
          echo "Deploying to production..."
          echo "Deployment completed successfully."

      - name: Capture failure diagnostics
        if: failure()
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "=== Failure Diagnostics ==="
          echo "Timestamp: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")"
          echo "Disk usage:"
          df -h
          echo "Memory usage:"
          free -m || true
          echo "Process list:"
          ps aux

      - name: Upload logs artifact
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: debug-logs
          path: |
            /tmp/api_response_body.txt
